TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == hinatimelay a imelang śÖĘśÄßÁĖ≤ŚčěÁóáŚÄôÁĺ§ == hina timelay a imelang "igu: chronic fatigue syndrome,nisaadidian a sulit :CFS" singangan naca tu adada nu udiudipan tangah "igu: myalgic encephalomyelitis,nisaadidian a sulit:ME", ayda singangan tu adada nu udiudipan tangah/ hina timelay a imelang "ME/CFS", i udipay nu matulinay a nika timelan a adada caay tu kahademhem ku udiudipan, nika taisingan a makaala tu enemay a buladan, a wadaen ku nika timelan a nikacaayan ka tinengan nu nikatimelan atu utiih nu udiudipan. (ME/CFS), . ayda nu mahiniay a imelanga caay henay kaw kakatinengan, sakabalihenawan caay ka yadah ku katinengan, yu mahida nu baduk sa acacay ku katinengan, nika i tini i ke-sye anicudadan nai' henay ku wantan sa. nu hatidaay tu a imelangay mahida u nisakakawawan tu nikasinpayan atu namakaydaay i balucuay, atu hatidaay a nikaudipan, anu pakeda han ku udip a matimel, caay lihidai, alaw a yadah ku kalihanawan nu adadaan, sipakayda i ahemaway nu " timelan" alaw pihacen satu a " mapatay nu ngelu'an". "ťĀéŚčě". mahicaay a imelangÁóÖŚĺĶ hina timelay a imelang yadah, idaw ku, adada nu ukaukakan, maliyuh a mitaneng, itini i udiudipan atu cikalaan hamaw sa a inai' ku'ken. . duma satu mahida u : nikasinicuan, tahekal ku tibeni atu caay kaw kakatahekalan nu imelangan. amica ku nikatimelan u hatidaay tu nu imelanga tahekal naming ku mahiniaay a adadaan, nika CFS a hatidaay tu nu imelangan, hatidaay nu imelangan caay ka lacad a tahekal, sisa utiih a katinengan. 48 153 ME/CFS a imelangan nai' henay ku wantan. saan siawulan atu hekalan mapalalid naming, nika itini i nikaawulan inai' ku wantan sa. sinkicu atu sakalaheci nu udiudipan atu nika tahekalan nu wendayan hakiya anumihiniay tu sa. ME/CFS u cilakayan a adadaan, caay kaw namakayda i udip atu nabalucuan a imelang, caay kaw nika laecus nu hulumungan sa. ME/CFS .ME/CFS . nika taisinganŤ®ļśĖ∑ hinatimelay a imelang katukuh ayda nai' henay ku laheci a mikinsa tu sapalutatengaan a nika taisingan. itida i dayday nu kanpuyaku sipayhida i "nai' ku ken a humingan" itini i si-yi, nika taisingan sipakayda i Amilika nu sapiput atu a hican mihaymaw a nakamuan, nu mahiniay a imelangan a idaw ku malabuaay nu tusaay a sasulitan: milakuuyd tu enemay a buladan, matulin ina' ku nika hicahicaan sa pihaceng sa ku timel, nika timelan caay kaw nika lakuuydan a misakakawaw. mahiniay a imelangan anu pahanhan sa caay tu ka ngaay sa, saisa anu tiyung sa mahicaay tu kiya ku udiudipan nu mita. 101 310 Ť∂ÖťĀé6 . itini i sasa idaw ku sepatay atu mitapabaw a waywayan, hina pawanpawan mahicaay kiya ku tangah, nami sakakawaw satu, hina timeltimel, namakemet satu caay tu ka sumad ku timel,adda' ku udiudipan, adada' saca ku ukaukakan, atu nika caayan kalecad atu naayawan ku adada atu pihaceng ku adada nu tangah, muliyawmuliyaw ku adada nu takulaw, lalielan atu kakilian idaw ku alutid. 60 370 sakay tina hina timelay a imelangan nai' ku tada sapingaay a sakataydaan i ising payu, inai' ku tatengaay a sapyuan, itini i kanpuyaku atu nu isingan, idaw ku sananay tu mahiniay u sakataisingan nu mingaayay atu sapisumadaw tu cilekayyan a imelangan, itini i isingan sa, sipakayda i sapicunus tu idangan a mingaay tina imelangan, itini i kanpuyaku hantu, sipakayda i yen-ce misumad tu udip a yi-yen, namakayda misumad tu udip nu imelangan, acaay ka hinacunuscunus, sipakayda i kan-may-ta-caw-tan pacumud misumad tu udiudipan. duma satu, sipakayda tu nipicucukan atu ci-kun idaw ku mihinaay tu sapingaay tu mahiniay a imelangan sa. .
S.PHON: == ńßinatim…ôr~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ******* == ńßina tim…ôr~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč "igu: ¶ńßroni ¶ fatigu…ô sjndrom…ô,nisaadidian a sur~…ĺit : ¶fs" siŇčaŇčan na ¶a tu adada nu udiudipan taŇčańß "igu: mjar~…ĺgi ¶ …ôn ¶…ôpńßar~…ĺomj…ôr~…ĺitis,nisaadidian a sur~…ĺit:m…ô", ajda siŇčaŇčan tu adada nu udiudipan taŇčańß/ ńßina tim…ôr~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč "m…ô/ ¶fs", i udipaj nu matur~…ĺinaj a nika tim…ôr~…ĺan a adada ¶aaj tu kańßad…ômńß…ôm ku udiudipan, nika taisiŇčan a makaar~…ĺa tu …ôn…ômaj a bur~…ĺadan, a wada…ôn ku nika tim…ôr~…ĺan a nika ¶aajan ka tin…ôŇčan nu nikatim…ôr~…ĺan atu utiińß nu udiudipan. (m…ô/ ¶fs), . ajda nu mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇča ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kaw kakatin…ôŇčan, sakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan ¶aaj ka jadańß ku katin…ôŇčan, ju mańßida nu baduk sa a ¶a ¶aj ku katin…ôŇčan, nika i tini i k…ô-sj…ô ani ¶udadan nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku wantan sa. nu ńßatidaaj tu a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj mańßida u nisakakawawan tu nikasinpajan atu namakajdaaj i bar~…ĺu ¶uaj, atu ńßatidaaj a nikaudipan, anu pak…ôda ńßan ku udip a matim…ôr~…ĺ, ¶aaj r~…ĺińßidai, ar~…ĺaw a jadańß ku kar~…ĺińßanawan nu adadaan, sipakajda i ańß…ômawaj nu " tim…ôr~…ĺan" ar~…ĺaw pińßa ¶…ôn satu a " mapataj nu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °an". "**". mańßi ¶aaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč** ńßina tim…ôr~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč jadańß, idaw ku, adada nu ukaukakan, mar~…ĺijuńß a mitan…ôŇč, itini i udiudipan atu ¶ikar~…ĺaan ńßamaw sa a inai Ē~ ° ku Ē~ °k…ôn. . duma satu mańßida u : nikasini ¶uan, tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku tib…ôni atu ¶aaj kaw kakatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. ami ¶a ku nikatim…ôr~…ĺan u ńßatidaaj tu nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇča tańß…ôkar~…ĺ namiŇč ku mańßiniaaj a adadaan, nika ¶fs a ńßatidaaj tu nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, ńßatidaaj nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan ¶aaj ka r~…ĺa ¶ad a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, sisa utiińß a katin…ôŇčan. ** *** m…ô/ ¶fs a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku wantan. saan siawur~…ĺan atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺan mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid namiŇč, nika itini i nikaawur~…ĺan inai Ē~ ° ku wantan sa. sinki ¶u atu sakar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nu udiudipan atu nika tańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu w…ôndajan ńßakija anumińßiniaj tu sa. m…ô/ ¶fs u ¶ir~…ĺakajan a adadaan, ¶aaj kaw namakajda i udip atu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ¶aaj kaw nika r~…ĺa…ô ¶us nu ńßur~…ĺumuŇčan sa. m…ô/ ¶fs .m…ô/ ¶fs . nika taisiŇčan** ńßinatim…ôr~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč katukuńß ajda nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i a mikinsa tu sapar~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan a nika taisiŇčan. itida i dajdaj nu kanpujaku sipajńßida i "nai Ē~ ° ku k…ôn a ńßumiŇčan" itini i si-ji, nika taisiŇčan sipakajda i amir~…ĺika nu sapiput atu a ńßi ¶an mińßajmaw a nakamuan, nu mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan a idaw ku mar~…ĺabuaaj nu tusaaj a sasur~…ĺitan: mir~…ĺakuujd tu …ôn…ômaj a bur~…ĺadan, matur~…ĺin ina Ē~ ° ku nika ńßi ¶ańßi ¶aan sa pińßa ¶…ôŇč sa ku tim…ôr~…ĺ, nika tim…ôr~…ĺan ¶aaj kaw nika r~…ĺakuujdan a misakakawaw. mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan anu pańßanńßan sa ¶aaj tu ka Ňčaaj sa, saisa anu tijuŇč sa mańßi ¶aaj tu kija ku udiudipan nu mita. *** *** *** . itini i sasa idaw ku s…ôpataj atu mitapabaw a wajwajan, ńßina pawanpawan mańßi ¶aaj kija ku taŇčańß, nami sakakawaw satu, ńßina tim…ôr~…ĺtim…ôr~…ĺ, namak…ôm…ôt satu ¶aaj tu ka sumad ku tim…ôr~…ĺ,adda Ē~ ° ku udiudipan, adada Ē~ ° sa ¶a ku ukaukakan, atu nika ¶aajan kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu naajawan ku adada atu pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku adada nu taŇčańß, mur~…ĺijawmur~…ĺijaw ku adada nu takur~…ĺaw, r~…ĺar~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺan atu kakir~…ĺian idaw ku ar~…ĺutid. ** *** sakaj tina ńßina tim…ôr~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nai Ē~ ° ku tada sapiŇčaaj a sakatajdaan i isiŇč paju, inai Ē~ ° ku tat…ôŇčaaj a sapjuan, itini i kanpujaku atu nu isiŇčan, idaw ku sananaj tu mańßiniaj u sakataisiŇčan nu miŇčaajaj atu sapisumadaw tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajjan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, itini i isiŇčan sa, sipakajda i sapi ¶unus tu idaŇčan a miŇčaaj tina im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, itini i kanpujaku ńßantu, sipakajda i j…ôn- ¶…ô misumad tu udip a ji-j…ôn, namakajda misumad tu udip nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, a ¶aaj ka ńßina ¶unus ¶unus, sipakajda i kan-maj-ta- ¶aw-tan pa ¶umud misumad tu udiudipan. duma satu, sipakajda tu nipi ¶u ¶ukan atu ¶i-kun idaw ku mińßinaaj tu sapiŇčaaj tu mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan sa. .
S.FORM: == hinatimelay a imelang śÖĘśÄßÁĖ≤ŚčěÁóáŚÄôÁĺ§ == hina timelay a imelang "igu: chronic fatigue syndrome,nisaadidian a sulit :CFS" singangan naca tu adada nu udiudipan tangah "igu: myalgic encephalomyelitis,nisaadidian a sulit:ME", ayda singangan tu adada nu udiudipan tangah/ hina timelay a imelang "ME/CFS", i udipay nu matulinay a nika timelan a adada caay tu kahademhem ku udiudipan, nika taisingan a makaala tu enemay a buladan, a wadaen ku nika timelan a nikacaayan ka tinengan nu nikatimelan atu utiih nu udiudipan. (ME/CFS), . ayda nu mahiniay a imelanga caay henay kaw kakatinengan, sakabalihenawan caay ka yadah ku katinengan, yu mahida nu baduk sa acacay ku katinengan, nika i tini i ke-sye anicudadan nai' henay ku wantan sa. nu hatidaay tu a imelangay mahida u nisakakawawan tu nikasinpayan atu namakaydaay i balucuay, atu hatidaay a nikaudipan, anu pakeda han ku udip a matimel, caay lihidai, alaw a yadah ku kalihanawan nu adadaan, sipakayda i ahemaway nu " timelan" alaw pihacen satu a " mapatay nu ngelu'an". "ťĀéŚčě". mahicaay a imelangÁóÖŚĺĶ hina timelay a imelang yadah, idaw ku, adada nu ukaukakan, maliyuh a mitaneng, itini i udiudipan atu cikalaan hamaw sa a inai' ku'ken. . duma satu mahida u : nikasinicuan, tahekal ku tibeni atu caay kaw kakatahekalan nu imelangan. amica ku nikatimelan u hatidaay tu nu imelanga tahekal naming ku mahiniaay a adadaan, nika CFS a hatidaay tu nu imelangan, hatidaay nu imelangan caay ka lacad a tahekal, sisa utiih a katinengan. 48 153 ME/CFS a imelangan nai' henay ku wantan. saan siawulan atu hekalan mapalalid naming, nika itini i nikaawulan inai' ku wantan sa. sinkicu atu sakalaheci nu udiudipan atu nika tahekalan nu wendayan hakiya anumihiniay tu sa. ME/CFS u cilakayan a adadaan, caay kaw namakayda i udip atu nabalucuan a imelang, caay kaw nika laecus nu hulumungan sa. ME/CFS .ME/CFS . nika taisinganŤ®ļśĖ∑ hinatimelay a imelang katukuh ayda nai' henay ku laheci a mikinsa tu sapalutatengaan a nika taisingan. itida i dayday nu kanpuyaku sipayhida i "nai' ku ken a humingan" itini i si-yi, nika taisingan sipakayda i Amilika nu sapiput atu a hican mihaymaw a nakamuan, nu mahiniay a imelangan a idaw ku malabuaay nu tusaay a sasulitan: milakuuyd tu enemay a buladan, matulin ina' ku nika hicahicaan sa pihaceng sa ku timel, nika timelan caay kaw nika lakuuydan a misakakawaw. mahiniay a imelangan anu pahanhan sa caay tu ka ngaay sa, saisa anu tiyung sa mahicaay tu kiya ku udiudipan nu mita. 101 310 Ť∂ÖťĀé6 . itini i sasa idaw ku sepatay atu mitapabaw a waywayan, hina pawanpawan mahicaay kiya ku tangah, nami sakakawaw satu, hina timeltimel, namakemet satu caay tu ka sumad ku timel,adda' ku udiudipan, adada' saca ku ukaukakan, atu nika caayan kalecad atu naayawan ku adada atu pihaceng ku adada nu tangah, muliyawmuliyaw ku adada nu takulaw, lalielan atu kakilian idaw ku alutid. 60 370 sakay tina hina timelay a imelangan nai' ku tada sapingaay a sakataydaan i ising payu, inai' ku tatengaay a sapyuan, itini i kanpuyaku atu nu isingan, idaw ku sananay tu mahiniay u sakataisingan nu mingaayay atu sapisumadaw tu cilekayyan a imelangan, itini i isingan sa, sipakayda i sapicunus tu idangan a mingaay tina imelangan, itini i kanpuyaku hantu, sipakayda i yen-ce misumad tu udip a yi-yen, namakayda misumad tu udip nu imelangan, acaay ka hinacunuscunus, sipakayda i kan-may-ta-caw-tan pacumud misumad tu udiudipan. duma satu, sipakayda tu nipicucukan atu ci-kun idaw ku mihinaay tu sapingaay tu mahiniay a imelangan sa. .
S.PHON: == ńßinatim…ôr~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ******* == ńßina tim…ôr~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč "igu: ¶ńßroni ¶ fatigu…ô sjndrom…ô,nisaadidian a sur~…ĺit : ¶fs" siŇčaŇčan na ¶a tu adada nu udiudipan taŇčańß "igu: mjar~…ĺgi ¶ …ôn ¶…ôpńßar~…ĺomj…ôr~…ĺitis,nisaadidian a sur~…ĺit:m…ô", ajda siŇčaŇčan tu adada nu udiudipan taŇčańß/ ńßina tim…ôr~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč "m…ô/ ¶fs", i udipaj nu matur~…ĺinaj a nika tim…ôr~…ĺan a adada ¶aaj tu kańßad…ômńß…ôm ku udiudipan, nika taisiŇčan a makaar~…ĺa tu …ôn…ômaj a bur~…ĺadan, a wada…ôn ku nika tim…ôr~…ĺan a nika ¶aajan ka tin…ôŇčan nu nikatim…ôr~…ĺan atu utiińß nu udiudipan. (m…ô/ ¶fs), . ajda nu mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇča ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kaw kakatin…ôŇčan, sakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan ¶aaj ka jadańß ku katin…ôŇčan, ju mańßida nu baduk sa a ¶a ¶aj ku katin…ôŇčan, nika i tini i k…ô-sj…ô ani ¶udadan nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku wantan sa. nu ńßatidaaj tu a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj mańßida u nisakakawawan tu nikasinpajan atu namakajdaaj i bar~…ĺu ¶uaj, atu ńßatidaaj a nikaudipan, anu pak…ôda ńßan ku udip a matim…ôr~…ĺ, ¶aaj r~…ĺińßidai, ar~…ĺaw a jadańß ku kar~…ĺińßanawan nu adadaan, sipakajda i ańß…ômawaj nu " tim…ôr~…ĺan" ar~…ĺaw pińßa ¶…ôn satu a " mapataj nu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °an". "**". mańßi ¶aaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč** ńßina tim…ôr~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč jadańß, idaw ku, adada nu ukaukakan, mar~…ĺijuńß a mitan…ôŇč, itini i udiudipan atu ¶ikar~…ĺaan ńßamaw sa a inai Ē~ ° ku Ē~ °k…ôn. . duma satu mańßida u : nikasini ¶uan, tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku tib…ôni atu ¶aaj kaw kakatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. ami ¶a ku nikatim…ôr~…ĺan u ńßatidaaj tu nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇča tańß…ôkar~…ĺ namiŇč ku mańßiniaaj a adadaan, nika ¶fs a ńßatidaaj tu nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, ńßatidaaj nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan ¶aaj ka r~…ĺa ¶ad a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, sisa utiińß a katin…ôŇčan. ** *** m…ô/ ¶fs a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku wantan. saan siawur~…ĺan atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺan mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid namiŇč, nika itini i nikaawur~…ĺan inai Ē~ ° ku wantan sa. sinki ¶u atu sakar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nu udiudipan atu nika tańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu w…ôndajan ńßakija anumińßiniaj tu sa. m…ô/ ¶fs u ¶ir~…ĺakajan a adadaan, ¶aaj kaw namakajda i udip atu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ¶aaj kaw nika r~…ĺa…ô ¶us nu ńßur~…ĺumuŇčan sa. m…ô/ ¶fs .m…ô/ ¶fs . nika taisiŇčan** ńßinatim…ôr~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč katukuńß ajda nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i a mikinsa tu sapar~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan a nika taisiŇčan. itida i dajdaj nu kanpujaku sipajńßida i "nai Ē~ ° ku k…ôn a ńßumiŇčan" itini i si-ji, nika taisiŇčan sipakajda i amir~…ĺika nu sapiput atu a ńßi ¶an mińßajmaw a nakamuan, nu mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan a idaw ku mar~…ĺabuaaj nu tusaaj a sasur~…ĺitan: mir~…ĺakuujd tu …ôn…ômaj a bur~…ĺadan, matur~…ĺin ina Ē~ ° ku nika ńßi ¶ańßi ¶aan sa pińßa ¶…ôŇč sa ku tim…ôr~…ĺ, nika tim…ôr~…ĺan ¶aaj kaw nika r~…ĺakuujdan a misakakawaw. mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan anu pańßanńßan sa ¶aaj tu ka Ňčaaj sa, saisa anu tijuŇč sa mańßi ¶aaj tu kija ku udiudipan nu mita. *** *** *** . itini i sasa idaw ku s…ôpataj atu mitapabaw a wajwajan, ńßina pawanpawan mańßi ¶aaj kija ku taŇčańß, nami sakakawaw satu, ńßina tim…ôr~…ĺtim…ôr~…ĺ, namak…ôm…ôt satu ¶aaj tu ka sumad ku tim…ôr~…ĺ,adda Ē~ ° ku udiudipan, adada Ē~ ° sa ¶a ku ukaukakan, atu nika ¶aajan kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu naajawan ku adada atu pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku adada nu taŇčańß, mur~…ĺijawmur~…ĺijaw ku adada nu takur~…ĺaw, r~…ĺar~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺan atu kakir~…ĺian idaw ku ar~…ĺutid. ** *** sakaj tina ńßina tim…ôr~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nai Ē~ ° ku tada sapiŇčaaj a sakatajdaan i isiŇč paju, inai Ē~ ° ku tat…ôŇčaaj a sapjuan, itini i kanpujaku atu nu isiŇčan, idaw ku sananaj tu mańßiniaj u sakataisiŇčan nu miŇčaajaj atu sapisumadaw tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajjan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, itini i isiŇčan sa, sipakajda i sapi ¶unus tu idaŇčan a miŇčaaj tina im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, itini i kanpujaku ńßantu, sipakajda i j…ôn- ¶…ô misumad tu udip a ji-j…ôn, namakajda misumad tu udip nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, a ¶aaj ka ńßina ¶unus ¶unus, sipakajda i kan-maj-ta- ¶aw-tan pa ¶umud misumad tu udiudipan. duma satu, sipakajda tu nipi ¶u ¶ukan atu ¶i-kun idaw ku mińßinaaj tu sapiŇčaaj tu mańßiniaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan sa. .
